name: Collision Events
description: Real 2D elastic collision physics simulation — frame-by-frame equations of motion with wall bouncing.

CollisionPhysics.description: Elastic collision physics: two balls approach, collide at center, bounce off walls. Uses 1D elastic collision equations: v1' = ((m1-m2)v1 + 2m2*v2)/(m1+m2), v2' = ((m2-m1)v2 + 2m1*v1)/(m1+m2). Particles scatter radially with gravity.
CollisionPhysics.code: function(props){var f=props.frame,W=props.layerSize.width,H=props.layerSize.height,yC=H/2,CF=60,r=120,m1=5,m2=4.5,v1i=27,v2i=-27,v1f=((m1-m2)*v1i+2*m2*v2i)/(m1+m2),v2f=((m2-m1)*v2i+2*m1*v1i)/(m1+m2);function bounce(x0,v0,n){var x=x0,v=v0;for(var t=0;t<n;t++){x+=v;if(x<r){x=2*r-x;v=Math.abs(v);}if(x>W-r){x=2*(W-r)-x;v=-Math.abs(v);}}return x;}var dt=f>=CF?f-CF:0,x1=f<CF?180+v1i*f:bounce(1800,v1f,dt),x2=f<CF?3660+v2i*f:bounce(2040,v2f,dt),els=[],pC=['#ffff00','#ff8800','#00ff88','#ff4444','#ffaa00','#aa44ff','#44ff88','#ff8844','#ccff00','#ff00aa'],pS=[50,70,45,60,40,55,35,65,42,52];if(f>=CF){for(var i=0;i<10;i++){var al=Math.max(0,1-dt/80);if(al>0){var ang=(i/10)*2*Math.PI,spd=20+(i%3)*10;els.push(React.createElement('ellipse',{key:'p'+i,cx:1920+Math.cos(ang)*spd*dt,cy:yC+Math.sin(ang)*spd*dt+0.15*dt*dt,rx:pS[i],ry:pS[i],fill:pC[i],opacity:al}));}}if(dt<20){var gR=130+dt*25,gO=0.6*(1-dt/20),fR=80*(1-dt/20);els.push(React.createElement('ellipse',{key:'gl',cx:1920,cy:yC,rx:gR,ry:gR,fill:'none',stroke:'#aaffff',strokeWidth:8,opacity:gO}));els.push(React.createElement('ellipse',{key:'fl',cx:1920,cy:yC,rx:fR,ry:fR,fill:'#ffffff',opacity:gO}));}}els.push(React.createElement('ellipse',{key:'a',cx:x1,cy:yC,rx:r,ry:r,fill:'#00ccff'}));els.push(React.createElement('ellipse',{key:'b',cx:x2,cy:yC,rx:r,ry:r,fill:'#ff44ff'}));return React.createElement('svg',{xmlns:'http://www.w3.org/2000/svg',width:W,height:H,style:{position:'absolute',top:0,left:0,overflow:'hidden'}},...els);}

props.text:
PARTICLE A
v₀ = +810 px/s
m = 5.0 kg

PARTICLE B
v₀ = −810 px/s
m = 4.5 kg
⚡  ELASTIC COLLISION  —  v₁' = −724.8 px/s  •  v₂' = +895.2 px/s  ⚡
KE_initial = 3,463 J   →   KE_final = 3,463 J   •   ΔKE = 0   •   Δp = 0   •   η = 100%
